name: 76qt Heavy Duty Latching Clear Storage Box - Brightroom™: Plastic Utility Bin with Lid, Portable Universal Storage
description:
The Brightroom™ Garage Storage Bin with lid makes it easy to organize busy spaces, from garages and basements to utility rooms. Built for demanding environments, the clear plastic bin lets you quickly see and grab what you need while keeping items protected. Rugged, secure latches hold the lid firmly in place during carrying and stacking, and the textured surface provides a comfortable, non-slip grip. Deep recessed lids provide stability when stacking and maximize vertical storage space. This 76 quart storage container is ideal for sports gear, out-of-season clothing, extra bedding, camping gear, and hobby supplies, as well as bulky craft or DIY project materials, delivering dependable, versatile storage for every space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
